positive: A vibrant, graphic illustration featuring stylized celestial elements intertwined with flourishing tropical botanical motifs. The design must be composed of clean, bold linework and solid, highly saturated color blocks, achieving a cohesive, centralized silhouette. Utilize a Neo-Art Deco aesthetic mixed with Pacific Northwest tattoo linework. Elements include stylized crescent moons, constellations, geometric stars, and exaggerated tropical leaves (such as monstera, hibiscus, and palm fronds). The composition must be perfectly balanced and ready for textile printing, featuring high contrast black ink against a soft cream background. Studio lighting, vector graphic style, isolated on white.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, letter, dirty, lowres, grayscale, realism, photorealistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, messy composition
